sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41302" key="e)piterateu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτερᾰτεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heighten a marvellous story,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:2:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
